narrative:
Sugar Creek township has 3,785 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.4 percentage points.
